description: A compact word-level transcript with timing data. Words are derived from whitespace-splitting the text. Timings is a flat array: positive numbers are word durations (ms), negative numbers are silence gaps (abs value ms) before the next word. Words are assumed contiguous by default.

talkUri.description: AT URI to the tv.ionosphere.talk this transcribes.

text.description: Full transcript text. Word boundaries derived from whitespace tokenization.

startMs.description: Absolute start time of the first word in milliseconds from video start.

timings.description: Flat array: positive = word duration (ms), next word starts immediately. Negative = silence gap (abs ms) before next word. Nth positive value corresponds to Nth whitespace token in text.
